/cwe/weakness/694.Name: Use of Multiple Resources with Duplicate Identifier
/cwe/weakness/694.Description: The product uses multiple resources that can have the same identifier, in a context in which unique identifiers are required.
/cwe/weakness/694.ExtendedDescription: If the product assumes that each resource has a unique identifier, the product could operate on the wrong resource if attackers can cause multiple resources to be associated with the same identifier.

CommonConsequences.Note: If unique identifiers are assumed when protecting sensitive resources, then duplicate identifiers might allow attackers to bypass the protection.

Entries.IntroText: These two Struts validation forms have the same name.

Entries.BodyText: It is not certain which form will be used by Struts. It is critically important that validation logic be maintained and kept in sync with the rest of the product.

PotentialMitigations.Description: Where possible, use unique identifiers. If non-unique identifiers are detected, then do not operate any resource with a non-unique identifier and report the error appropriately.
